			"a":1.64347e-07,
			"C_x":1e+06,
			"iter":10,
			"sei":0.116195,
			"ses":0.00357523,
			"r2":0.975962,
			"slope":0.164276,
			"domain":53,
			"n":54
			}
		]
	}
}
			}
	}
}
